name: Project A
cn_bullets: 写与你目标岗位相关的项目背景
写你用了什么方法、工具或流程
写这个项目带来了什么结果或价值
en_bullets: Describe the project context relevant to your target roles
Describe the methods, tools, or workflow you used
Describe the impact or result of the project

name: Project B
cn_bullets: 写数据处理、工程实现或模型开发相关内容
写关键技术栈，例如 SQL、Python、Spark、Kafka、LLM
写业务落地效果或性能提升
en_bullets: Describe data engineering, implementation, or modeling work
List the key stack such as SQL, Python, Spark, Kafka, or LLMs
Describe business impact or performance improvement
